'''鈭歞-ch-t-z''' ('''kadachtezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumonectomize|pneumonectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumonectomize|pneumonectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-ch-t-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadachtezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidachtezoko|thidachtezoko]] || [[word:jidachtezoko|jidachtezoko]] || [[word:shidachtezoko|shidachtezoko]] || [[word:kidachtezoko|kidachtezoko]]
|-
